features.name: multiple always_ff blocks with different clock domains
features.description: Code should include multiple always_ff blocks each with a distinct clock input and asynchronous reset
features.snippet:
always_ff @(posedge clk_1, negedge rstn_1) if (rstn_1 == 0) out[1] <= 0;
always_ff @(posedge clk_2, negedge rstn_2) if (rstn_2 == 0) out[2] <= 0;
